title: Add json-only mode and quickstart docs for associated-dataset evaluations

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementing smoother associated-dataset evaluation UX: add --json-only to evaluate accuracy and add quickstart docs with canonical two-step flow (curate dataset, run evaluate accuracy --use-score-associated-dataset).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented smoothing updates: (1) evaluate accuracy now supports --json-only, emitting structured JSON for dry-run, validation failures, associated-dataset multi-run summaries, and standard single-run completion payload. (2) Added documentation quickstart sections in associated-datasets concept and evaluate-score method pages with canonical curate->evaluate flow and --json-only examples. Validation: py_compile evaluations.py; help output shows new option; runtime check confirmed JSON error payload for validation failure path.
